mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USERS WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USERS WHERE phone = #{phone}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USERS.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO USERS ( email, password_hash, name, phone, birth_date, marketing_agree, privacy_agree, status_code, is_email_verified, is_phone_verified, push_enabled, login_fail_count, created_at, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{birthDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{marketingAgree, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y', 'ACTIVE', 'N', 'N', 'Y', 0, SYSTIMESTAMP, 'N' )
mapper.update:
UPDATE USERS
name = #{name},
phone = #{phone}, is_phone_verified = 'N',
job = #{job}, income_level_code = #{incomeLevelCode}, push_enabled = #{pushEnabled}, marketing_agree = #{marketingAgree}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP
WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
UPDATE USERS SET is_email_verified = #{isEmailVerified}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USERS SET is_phone_verified = #{isPhoneVerified}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USERS SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, last_password_changed_at = #{lastPasswordChangedAt}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USERS SET login_fail_count = 0, locked_until = NULL WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE USER_SESSIONS SET revoked_yn = 'Y', revoked_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AUDIT_LOGS ( actor_type_code, actor_id, action_type_code, target_type_code, target_id, description, ip_address, created_at ) VALUES ( #{actorType}, #{actorId}, #{actionType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT uc.user_card_id, uc.card_id, c.card_name, ci.image_url AS card_image_url, TO_CHAR(uc.issued_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS issued_at FROM USER_CARDS uc JOIN CARDS c ON c.card_id = uc.card_id LEFT JOIN CARD_IMAGES ci ON ci.card_id = uc.card_id AND ci.image_type = 'FRONT' WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY uc.issued_at DESC

SELECT ca.application_id, ca.card_id, c.card_name, ci.image_url AS card_image_url, ca.application_status, TO_CHAR(ca.applied_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS applied_at FROM CARD_APPLICATIONS ca JOIN CARDS c ON c.card_id = ca.card_id LEFT JOIN CARD_IMAGES ci ON ci.card_id = ca.card_id AND ci.image_type = 'THUMBNAIL' WHERE ca.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ca.applied_at DESC

SELECT cc.category_id, cc.category_name, NVL(usp.monthly_amount, 0) AS monthly_amount, cc.color_code FROM CARD_CATEGORIES cc LEFT JOIN USER_SPENDING_PATTERNS usp ON usp.category_id = cc.category_id AND usp.user_id = #{userId} WHERE cc.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY cc.display_order ASC
mapper.update: MERGE INTO USER_SPENDING_PATTERNS usp USING ( SELECT #{userId} AS user_id, #{categoryId} AS category_id, #{monthlyAmount} AS monthly_amount, #{source} AS source FROM DUAL ) src ON ( usp.user_id = src.user_id AND usp.category_id = src.category_id ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET usp.monthly_amount = src.monthly_amount, usp.source = src.source, usp.updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( user_id, category_id, monthly_amount, source, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( src.user_id, src.category_id, src.monthly_amount, src.source, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
